description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a variety of trees, featuring a flat roof and large, rectangular windows that allow for ample natural light. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and a mix of white and gray exterior surfaces, with some areas accented by glass railings and a visible balcony. The house includes a prominent garage on the lower level, and the main entrance is set back beneath an overhang supported by slender columns. The landscaping integrates both deciduous and palm trees, creating a lush, urban residential setting. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and steel, with a minimalist yet inviting appearance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of white and gray surfaces, surrounded by diverse trees. Features include a garage, balcony, and a sleek, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance with overhang, and a cluster of trees behind and to the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony with glass railing, flat roof, and a dense grouping of trees on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with more trees visible, showing the back facade and additional windows, less architectural detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the house's length, more windows, and a prominent balcony area, with trees densely packed on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, supported by slender columns, adjacent to a garage and minimal decorative elements
